title: santiria tessmannii
intro: Santiria tessmannii, also known as the Bay rum tree, is a plant species native to the tropical rainforests of West Africa. The medicinal properties of Santiria tessmannii are attributed to its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's oil has been used to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Santiria tessmannii include essential oil extraction, which is used in traditional medicine, aromatherapy, and as a natural remedy for various health benefits, including stress relief, skin issues, and as a natural insect repellent.
